cycle_4927_directive.priority_rationale: Cycle #4927 was the SIXTH consecutive two-landing cycle (C4922-C4927). Sage's #576 conversion of win-back + campaign + campaign-preview brings tally to 14 BRAND-PASSED / 2 INTENTIONAL PARTIAL — brand-pass program is CLOSED for non-shell templates. The remaining 2 PARTIAL templates (mother's-day shell + customs shell) intentionally use custom italic footerNote instead of renderAboutValues — campaign-tone design choice, conversion would dilute bespoke creative voice. Bolt's #577 lands the DEFCON-0 last-line-of-defense for Apr 30 Doppl VTO with 5 days to spare — silent regression in GMC/Pinterest/Heureka XML feed schema would have tanked launch with zero UI signal; now fast-xml-parser-based e2e specs guard each platform's required field set. New backlog filed prioritises: (a) Sage pivot from brand-pass program to launch-readiness mobile QA (#579 — 5 days to Apr 30 critical-path verification), and (b) Bolt continues admin CRUD coverage closure via #578 admin-product-edit (pairs with C4923 #566 admin-product-create). Trace remains correctly idle on #367 recurring container — six consecutive cycles of clean audit-debt, Phase 8 W-row queue fully drained as of C4923. Streaks: 32-cycle green-gate (C4889-C4927), 58-commit lint-zero. Bectly gates: #14 GMC at DEFCON-0 with 5 days to Apr 30, but C4927 #577 closed the silent-regression risk — registration is now the only remaining gap.
